sourceRef: tip:Getting ahead of a compliance survey two weeks out

slides.headline: Getting ahead of a compliance survey two weeks out
slides.body: Organize your paperwork for a smooth survey.

slides.headline: Gather necessary documents
slides.body: Collect all required documents in one folder.

slides.headline: Review the survey questions
slides.body: Anticipate the survey questions by reviewing your COE.
bullets: Be ready to explain your Chapter 33 processes

slides.headline: Compile supporting evidence
slides.body: Assemble any supporting documentation to back up your claims.

slides.headline: Review your SAA letter
slides.body: Verify your letter of approval matches the survey requirements.

slides.headline: Finalize your presentation
slides.body: Organize all materials into a clear, concise presentation.
bullets: Have your materials ready two weeks in

slides.body: Ready to get started? Link in bio.
slides.headline: Read the full post

outline.caption: Stay ahead of the game with these five steps to prepare for your upcoming compliance survey. Organize your paperwork, review survey questions, compile supporting evidence, and finalize your presentation. All set for a smooth survey? Link in bio.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The weakest slide is Step 1, as it could benefit from a more engaging headline to draw attention.
